steps.name: Launch WeChat DevTools automation session
steps.detail: Failed to launch/connect WeChat DevTools automation. SDK launch: Failed to launch wechat web devTools, please make sure cliPath is correctly specified; CLI fallbacks on port 19812: --auto-port: ws://127.0.0.1:19812: Failed connecting to ws://127.0.0.1:19812, check if target project window is opened with automation enabled | --port: ws://127.0.0.1:19812: Failed connecting to ws://127.0.0.1:19812, check if target project window is opened with automation enabled. If DevTools is already open, close it first or rerun with --fresh-devtools. If you opened an automation endpoint manually, pass --ws-endpoint.
